zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes de Arques於1110年出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾吉時，她的父親Osbern d'Arques51歲，母親Rohese de Bollington41歲。她於1135年與Alard de Orreby在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾帕茨 本 林賽結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1140年在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾多比享年30歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Arques
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Manuel, Jose, Carlos, Mario, Luis, Fernando, Jorge, Armando, Ana, Joaquin, Julio, Marcos.  Portuguese Joao, Joaquim, Paulo, Henrique, Lourenco, Seraphine, Vasco.

Catalan (Marquès); Spanish and southern French (Marqués): from Catalan marquès, Spanish and Occitan marqués ‘marquis’, words of French origin (see Marquis ), applied either as a nickname for someone who behaved like a marquis or as an occupational name for a servant in the household of a marquis.
Portuguese: patronymic from the personal name   Marcos  .

variants.name: Marquis
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Emile, Normand, Marcel, Fernand, Lucien, Rosaire, Andre, Armand, Camille, Cecile, Jacques, Francois.

French: from the title marquis ‘marquess’, applied as an ironic nickname to someone who behaved like a marquis or as a metonymic occupational name for a servant in the household of a marquis. The title, derived from an ancient Germanic word meaning ‘boundary’ (compare March ), originally referred to the governor of a border territory. Marquises did not form part of the original French feudal structure of nobility; the title was first adopted by the Counts of Toulouse because of their possessions in the border region beyond the Rhône. Compare Markee and Markey .

English: nickname from Middle English markis ‘marquis, marquess, nobleman’ (Old French marchis); see also 1 above. The word is also found as a female personal name which may also be origin of the surname.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes de Arques was born in 1110, in Kyme, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Osbern d'Arques, was 51 and her mother, Rohese de Bollington, was 41. She married Alard de Orreby in 1135, in Parts of Lindsey, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died in 1140, in Orby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 30.

ko.Orby, East Lindsey, Lincolnshire, Englan: 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 파르츠 프 린지
ko.lifeSummary: Agnes de Arques(이)가 1110년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 키에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Osbern d'Arques(은)는 51세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Rohese de Bollington(은)는 41세였다. 그녀는 1135년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 파르츠 프 린지에서 Alard de Orreby(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1140년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 오비에서 30세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes de Arques родилась в 1110 г. в местности ким, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Osbern d'Arques было 51 год, а матери, которую звали Rohese de Bollington, 41. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Alard de Orreby в 1135 г. в местности парц оф линдси, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь.
